title: rubus hirtus var. flaccidifrons
intro: Rubus hirtus var. flaccidifrons is a plant species commonly known as the Himalayan raspberry or Indian raspberry, belonging to the Rosaceae family. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus hirtus var. flaccidifrons include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and support wound healing. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its berries can be consumed fresh or used in jams and preserves.
